name: Arun Thapa
profileSummary: Arun Thapa Magar was a Nepali singer and songwriter. In 2003, according to an international poll conducted by BBC, more than half-a million people from 165 countries voted his composition Reetu haruma timi hariyali basant , his most famous romantic song, as the seventh in the world's top 10 most popular songs of all time.
